title: Suspected insider wallet profits $1.1M from LAB after 10x surge
summary: A wallet suspected of being an insider or market maker has realized an estimated profit of $1.13 million from the token LAB, which surged tenfold over the past month, EmberCN reported. Before the price increase, the wallet accumulated 575,000 LAB for $128,000 at an average price of $0.20. The holdings were deposited into Gate.io and KuCoin approximately 30 minutes ago.
author: @CoinnessGL

title: Hyperliquid Launches HIP-4 and Targets Polymarket With Zero-Fee Outcome Markets
summary:
1. Hyperliquid activated its HIP-4 Outcome Markets on mainnet May 2, 2026, bringing fully collateralized, onchain prediction markets directly into the same account where traders already run perpetual futures and spot positions.
2. Key Takeaways: Hyperliquid launched HIP-4 Outcome Markets on mainnet May 2, 2026, with BTC daily binary contracts live and trading.
3. HIP-4 charges zero fees […]
author: Jamie Redman

title: Prediction markets shifting to platforms for small, frequent retail trades
summary: Prediction markets are evolving from platforms for one-off event betting to hubs for small, frequent trades by individual users, Bitget and Polymarket said in a report. Polymarket's monthly trading volume surged from about $1.2 billion in 2025 to over $20 billion in early 2026, while its number of active wallets more than tripled in six months. Small-scale traders with under $10,000 account for 82% of all users. These users are trading on the real-time prices of a wide range of events, from cryptocurrency prices and economic indicators to sports and entertainment news. The total market size is projected to exceed $240 billion this year and is expected to grow into a $1 trillion industry in the long term.
author: @CoinnessGL

summary: 1. A new report from Bitget and Polymarket reveals that prediction markets are evolving into a $240 billion industry driven by retail users who are trading more frequently on everything from crypto to politics.

summary:

2. Key Takeaways: Ethereum finalized block 25 million on May 1, 2026, nearly 11 years after its July 2015 genesis with no prolonged global network shutdown.
3. The milestone reflects Ethereum’s decade-long operation through […]
author: Jamie Redman

title: Ethereum mainnet transactions hit all-time high in April
summary: Ethereum mainnet transactions reached a new all-time high of 72.8 million in April, according to a report from Blockbeat. The breakdown of transaction types was as follows:- Token transfers: 62%- Utility: 13%- Financial: 8%- Cross-chain: 2%- Other: 15%
author: @CoinnessGL

title: Developer claims new tool can recover 8,999 BTC lost in 2010
summary: A developer claims to have created a new CUDA-based tool capable of recovering 8,999 BTC lost in 2010, BeInCrypto reported. The funds, which belonged to a user known as Stone Man, were lost due to a bug in an early version of the Bitcoin client. The developer, a Reddit user named CompetitiveRough8180, asserts the tool can exploit weak entropy, or randomness, in the old client software to retrieve the lost coins. The stash of 8,999 BTC is currently valued at over $700 million.
author: @CoinnessGL

title: MiCA Decoded: Why the Regulator Sees Your Compliance Team as a Single Brain
summary:
1. The organizational chart with the right job titles will not get you licensed.
2. What the regulator is looking for is a compliance architecture: documented independence, collective expertise across three distinct knowledge domains, and real institutional substance.
3. This is how that standard works in practice.
author: Guest Author

title: Hyperliquid launches its first prediction market
summary: Hyperliquid has launched its first prediction market contract, BlockBeat reported. The inaugural contract on the HIP-4 binary prediction market will settle based on whether Bitcoin surpasses $78,213 at 5:00 a.m. UTC on May 3. Users can participate in the market using their existing futures trading margin without needing to connect a separate wallet.
author: @CoinnessGL

title: El Salvador Crypto Remittances Reach $17.38M
summary:
1. According to El Salvador’s Central Bank, the share of crypto-linked remittances sent to El Salvador rose by nearly 50% in Q1 2026 compared to the same period in 2025.
2. Even so, crypto remittances have failed to reach even 1% of the country’s total remittances.
3. Key Takeaways: El Salvador’s Central Bank reported Q1 crypto remittances hit […]
